description_long: This is a freestanding wooden coatrack with a circular base and a tall, slender central pole. Two tiers of horizontal arms radiate outward from the pole, each arm ending in a rounded knob to prevent garments from slipping off. The arms are evenly spaced and symmetrically arranged, providing ample hanging space for coats, hats, or bags. The wood has a natural finish, giving the coatrack a warm, classic appearance suitable for entryways or lobbies. The base is wide and flat, ensuring stability when loaded with items. There are no visible decorative carvings or embellishments, emphasizing a functional and minimalist design.
description: A freestanding wooden coatrack with two tiers of rounded arms and a circular base, finished in a natural wood tone. Its simple, functional design offers multiple hooks for hanging garments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, circular base, and symmetrical arrangement of the arms with rounded knobs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and alignment of the arms, with the central pole and base clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the even spacing of the hooks and the unobstructed pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the radial symmetry and the sturdy base.
